meta.title: Nozomi - Encryption in ICS and It's Impact on Passive Monitoring
meta.description:
Yiannis Stavrou of Nozomi Networks talks about encryption in ICS:
- the challenges in terms of latency and key management
- where it is being used today and in the future
- IEC 62351 with emphasis on Parts 3 and 7
- How to passively monitor an encrypted ICS network

He then finishes with two examples of how the Nozomi product could detect attacks to alter time via NTP (to potentially DoS due to expired certs) and loading a unauthorized certificate.
